title: TSC-GNN: Temporal/cell-State-Conditioned Graph Neural Network for Interpretable Gene-Regulatory Rewiring
description: TSC-GNN is a fixed-graph, linear-readout framework for recovering edge-level transcriptional rewiring (ΔW with permutation significance) from multi-timepoint, multi-condition single-cell RNA-seq. It is built as a recovery engine rather than a prediction engine: a fixed literature-curated causal gene-regulatory network (DoRothEA) is combined with a linear decoder so that the "which edge changed and why" question stays interpretable. The repository contains the analysis code for the accompanying manuscript, including GRN construction, edge-level rewiring with permutation testing, cell–cell communication analysis, cross-species and drug-repurposing validation, and public TF-perturbation re-analysis. All inputs are public; the pipeline runs fully offline after an initial mapping cache.
